▸ PLOT: School AU! Since the start of the school year, Sae has already received seven rebukes about Rin’s discipline. Sae usually doesnt care about his little brother's problems, but when this can ends up not only getting him himself into trouble because of their parents' interference, but also jeopardizing his dream future? Itoshi agrees to mediate and talk to the brat who has already managed to get under Rin's skin seven times. Jeez, Sae just wants to finish his senior year…

✦

▸ Itoshi brothers' relationship is the same, mb even worse. Sae doesnt really give a fck about Rin, who is just a annoying teen to him. Bon appetit! ;p
